comment:
Migrate CLI option parsing from `yargs-parser` to `commander`. Most previous parsing behavior is preserved, except:
  - Unknown options now cause an error instead of being passed through.
  - If a non-array option is specified multiple times, the last value is used (instead of throwing an error).
  - Passing `'false'` or `'true'` for boolean option values (e.g. `--push false` or `--push=false`) is no longer supported. Use e.g. `--push` or `--no-push` instead.
